recommendations.title: The Beach Bum
recommendations.overview: An irreverent comedy about the misadventures of Moondog, a rebellious stoner and lovable rogue who lives large.

recommendations.title: Mister Lonely
recommendations.overview: In Paris, a young American working as a Michael Jackson lookalike meets Marilyn Monroe, who invites him to her commune in Scotland, where she lives with Charlie Chaplin and her daughter, Shirley Temple.

recommendations.title: Julien Donkey-Boy
recommendations.overview: Undiagnosed, untreated and generally untethered schizophrenic Julien lives with his pregnant younger sister, anorexic aspiring wrestler brother, sympathetic grandmother, and severely depressed and abusive German father.

recommendations.title: Trash Humpers
recommendations.overview: Follow a small group of elderly “Peeping Toms” through the shadows and margins of an unfamiliar world. Crudely documented by the participants themselves, we follow the debased and shocking actions of a group of true sociopaths the likes of which have

recommendations.title: Spring Breakers
recommendations.overview: After four college girls rob a restaurant to fund their spring break in Florida, they get entangled with a weird dude with his own criminal agenda.

recommendations.title: 12 Years a Slave
recommendations.overview: In the pre-Civil War United States, Solomon Northup, a free black man from upstate New York, is abducted and sold into slavery. Facing cruelty as well as unexpected kindnesses Solomon struggles not only to stay alive, but to retain his dignity. In th

recommendations.title: As Cool as I Am
recommendations.overview: A smart teenage girl comes of age in a small town with her self-centered parents who had her when they were teenagers.

recommendations.title: The Devil All the Time
recommendations.overview: In Knockemstiff, Ohio and its neighboring backwoods, sinister characters converge around young Arvin Russell as he fights the evil forces that threaten him and his family.

recommendations.title: Edge of Seventeen
recommendations.overview: 1984, Sandusky, Ohio. A naive 17-year-old navigates heartbreak and self-expression as he explores his sexuality.

recommendations.title: Invasion of the Body Snatchers
recommendations.overview: A small-town doctor learns that the population of his community is being replaced by emotionless alien duplicates.
